name: ClawMax System Test
description: Integration test workspace template. Creates test agents, workflows, communities, and groups for automated and manual system testing. All agents use gpt-4o-mini for cost efficiency.
author: ClawMax Team

agents.name: Test Lead
agents.role: Test orchestrator — coordinates test execution, reports results, manages test plan

agents.name: Test Agent 1
agents.role: General test agent — participates in chat tests, workflow tests, and group messaging

agents.name: Test Agent 2
agents.role: Secondary test agent — used for parallel workflow tests and multi-agent scenarios

communities.name: Test Team
communities.description: System test community for all test agents

groups.name: Test Chat
groups.description: Group chat testing — all agents participate

workflows.name: Test Kickoff
workflows.description: Initialize test workspace — verify all agents, groups, and communities are set up
workflows.content:
# System Test Kickoff

You are part of the ClawMax system test team. Respond with a brief status:
1. Confirm your agent ID and role
2. List the groups you belong to
3. Say 'READY' to confirm you are operational

Keep response under 50 words.

workflows.name: Test Sequential Step
workflows.description: Sequential workflow test — runs after kickoff completes
workflows.content:
# Sequential Test

This workflow tests sequential execution after kickoff.
1. Confirm you received this message
2. Report the current time
3. Say 'SEQUENTIAL COMPLETE'

Keep response under 30 words.

workflows.name: Test Parallel A
workflows.description: Parallel workflow test A — runs alongside Parallel B after sequential
workflows.content:
# Parallel Test A

You are test-agent-1 running parallel test A.
1. Say 'PARALLEL A RUNNING'
2. Count to 3
3. Say 'PARALLEL A COMPLETE'

Keep response under 20 words.

workflows.name: Test Parallel B
workflows.description: Parallel workflow test B — runs alongside Parallel A after sequential
workflows.content:
# Parallel Test B

You are test-agent-2 running parallel test B.
1. Say 'PARALLEL B RUNNING'
2. Count to 3
3. Say 'PARALLEL B COMPLETE'

Keep response under 20 words.

workflows.name: Test Final
workflows.description: Final workflow — runs after both parallel tests complete (fan-in)
workflows.content:
# Final Test

All previous test workflows have completed.
1. Confirm the DAG pipeline executed: kickoff → sequential → parallel A+B → final
2. Post 'ALL TESTS PASSED' to the Test Status group
3. Report total workflow count

Keep response under 40 words.
